system.description: By use of this spell, the caster causes a brilliant sunburst of light to explode soundlessly at a predetermined point. Any creatures within the burst are blinded and take 3d6 hit points of damage. Those making a successful dexterity saving throw avoid blindness and take half the hit point damage. Creatures to whom sunlight is unusual or harmful take double damage. Undead who fail a dexterity save take an additional 1d6 damage per caster level and those who are specifically destroyed or harmed by sunlight (such as vampires) are automatically destroyed.
